required_validation_commands: JSON parse and phase-pack hash validation
focused match lifecycle, public API, fixture ingestion, TxLINE normalizer, odds discovery window, and public-contract leakage tests

Web validation consists of @matchpulse/web typecheck and production build. No Web test runner exists at the declared baseline. Record WEB_TEST_RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE and do not claim that Web regression tests ran.
expected_results: Upcoming contains no past, terminal, postponed, cancelled, abandoned, or non-representative row
configured future horizon has complete day coverage with isolated failures and a coverage ledger
no duplicate canonical identity across pages and no missing rows under cursor pagination
bounded batch enrichment with no per-fixture list query
precise availability reasons are present for incomplete data
no source or derived match data is deleted
no Prisma schema change, migration creation, migration application, database write, seed, deployment, or production write is applied by this phase
WEB_TEST_RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE is recorded and no Web regression test claim is made
production network access and production verification are prohibited by this phase
